summary: This document is a formal EU Declaration of Conformity issued by KeepMeCompany Ltd for its AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform. It certifies the software as a Class I medical device under EU MDR 2017/745, justifying the classification based on its function as a data collection tool rather than a diagnostic aid. The declaration is signed by CEO Eduardo Lizana and references applicable technical standards in Annex A.
path_to_original: /Users/eduardolizana/Documents/6. Companies /1. Companies with Rodrigo/KeepMeCompany/7. Administratives/3. QMS Documentation/1. Released Documents/2. Product/EU Declaration of Conformity.docx
folder: 7. Administratives/3. QMS Documentation/1. Released Documents/2. Product
sniff_test_notes: Contains a potential typo citing Regulation (EU) 2017/45 instead of 2017/745 in the Notified Body section. The Class I classification claim is critical for regulatory risk assessment given the AI nature of the product.
